description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12) and the latest Poetry version. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with Poetry, define a cache for the virtual environment, lint the code with flake8, and run automated tests with pytest.
